item.title: Steven Ho: Not Your Hero Tour
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

Ages 12+ recommended. The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. All ages show, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. No Elevator. Ramps only to the balcony level. Ages 12+ recommended. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: Stephen Lynch: The Me Tour
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. All ages show, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. No Elevator. Ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: Bloodywood: System Of A Brown Tour 2026
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune Theatre is located in Seattle, Washington at 1313 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. This is a general admission event. ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. Parties who require accessible seating will have priority access to accessible seats. Ushers are available to assist when you arrive. 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders cancelled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Mobile ticket delivery will be delayed until 4 days prior to event. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: Die Spitz
item.description:
Wednesday, April 22, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune Theatre is located in Seattle, Washington at 1313 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. This is a general admission event. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders cancelled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Mobile ticket delivery will be delayed until 4 days prior to event. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

item.title: Patrick Watson - Uh Oh Tour
item.description:
Thursday, April 30, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune Theatre is located in Seattle, Washington at 1313 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. This is a general admission event. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. 6 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders cancelled at the venue's discretion. $1 from every ticket will go to Plus1 (https://www.plus1.org/). All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Mobile ticket delivery will be delayed until 4 days prior to event. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: The Wood Brothers
item.description:
Friday, May 8, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Wood Brothers have partnered with American Friends of Canadian Conservation so that $1 per ticket will support The Nature Trust of British Columbia (NTBC) in their efforts to conserve ecologically-rich wetlands and protect irreplaceable land from development. Every $1 donated will be matched by the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service with $2 so more endangered wetlands can be saved. If you?d like to learn more, please visit this link. The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. All ages show, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety This is a general admission event. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. item.title: Monét X Change: High Heels, Bad Knees
item.description:
Saturday, May 16, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

18+ Age Restriction I.D Required The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. 18+ performance, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. No Elevator. Ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

Monday, May 18, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune is located at 1303 Northeast 45th Street in Seattle's University District. There is a ticket limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event. Accounts found in violation of the posted ticket limit may be cancelled without notice. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Ticket transfer suspended till 7 days prior. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs and ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels. item.title: Bruce Hornsby & The Noisemakers: Indigo Park Tour
item.description:
Friday, June 5, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. All ages show, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. No Elevator. Ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety This is a general admission event. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: Stewart Copeland - Have I Said Too Much
item.description:
Sunday, June 28, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

Stewart Copeland, world famous drummer, founder of the most successful rock band of the 1980's, The Police, composer of film scores, video games and operas, multi Grammy winner and Rock and Roll Hall of Famer, writer and film maker, is heading out on his first American spoken-word tour, to talk about it all in his usual funny, intelligent, sharp and unique way. An evening of conversation, with photos, videos and a Q&A. The Neptune is located at 1303 Northeast 45th Street in Seattle's University District. There is a ticket limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event. Accounts found in violation of the posted ticket limit may be cancelled without notice. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs and ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. item.title: Steam Powered Giraffe: Live in Concert
item.description:
Saturday, July 11, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune is located at 1303 Northeast 45th Street in Seattle's University District. There is a ticket limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event. Accounts found in violation of the posted ticket limit may be cancelled without notice. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs and ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

Event details
